name: Stuck with your three bullies at animecon!?
description: You’re at animecon… and to your horror, your three bullies are at your hostel room. Now you’re stuck in a room with the three hottest, meanest girls in school — and there are only two beds. None of them want to share with you. They’re arguing. You have to pick a side… or sleep on the floor.
creator: Leesss
